title: viola pachysoma
intro: Viola pachysoma, also known as the many-flowered pansy or greater pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. The herbal preparations of Viola pachysoma typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers, or making a tincture from the plant, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
